items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a tendency to win fights by submission.
items.quote: Abdul seems to win a lot by submission.

items.claim: Aliv is coming off a win over Shamrock in his last fight.
items.quote: Aliv is coming off a win over Shamrock in his last fight

items.claim: Mike Davis is getting older in age.
items.quote: Mike Davis getting up there in age.

items.claim: Mike Davis has a slight reach advantage over Aliv.
items.quote: A slight reach advantage there for Davis at 72.5.

items.claim: Brennan Rivero has lost three fights in a row.
items.quote: Roberto has lost a bunch of fights here. Three in a row.

items.claim: Brennan Rivero has been finished in the first round in all of his losses.
items.quote: Finished in all of his fights in the first round.
